headline: 1 Services Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Question
summary: Business services providers play a critical role for enterprises, assisting them with everything from new hardware integrations to consulting and marketing. Still, investors are uneasy as firms face challenges from AI-driven disruptors and tightening corporate budgets. These doubts have certainly contributed to services stocks’ recent underperformance - over the past six months, the industry’s 9% gain has fallen behind the S&P 500’s 10.7% rise.
